---
title: "09: Sample-wise CellChat"
output:
  github_document:
    html_preview: false
---

## R Libraries

```{r, results = FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(CellChat)
library(Seurat)
```

## Load Data and CellChat Database

```{r, results = FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
data.combined <- readRDS("RDS/data_23_umap_30_clusters.RDS")

data.combined <- JoinLayers(data.combined)
DefaultAssay(data.combined) <- "RNA"

# CellChat expects a `samples` column in meta.data for per-sample analyses
data.combined$samples <- data.combined$sample_names

# Use the curated human ligand–receptor database
CellChatDB <- CellChatDB.human
```

## Per-Sample CellChat Inference

```{r, results = FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
sampleNames <- unique(data.combined$sample_names)

for (samp in sampleNames) {
  
  message("Processing: ", samp)
  
  # Output paths
  rds_path <- paste0("RDS/cellchat/per_sample/cellchat_", samp, ".RDS")
  csv_path <- paste0("csvs/cellchat/per_sample/cellchat_", samp, ".csv")
  
  # Skip samples already processed
  if (file.exists(rds_path)) {
    message("Already exists, skipping: ", samp)
    next
  }
  
  # Subset Seurat object to current sample
  data_samp <- subset(data.combined, sample_names == samp)
  
  # Drop cell types with fewer than 10 cells
  min_cells <- 10
  cell_type_counts <- table(data_samp$new_ident)
  valid_types <- names(cell_type_counts[cell_type_counts >= min_cells])
  data_samp <- subset(data_samp, new_ident %in% valid_types)
  
  tryCatch({
    
    # Initialize CellChat object using cell type identity
    cc <- createCellChat(object = data_samp, group.by = "new_ident")
    cc@DB <- CellChatDB
    
    # Identify over-expressed ligands/receptors and the LR pairs they participate in
    cc <- subsetData(cc)
    cc <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cc)
    cc <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cc)
    
    # Compute communication probabilities
    cc <- computeCommunProb(cc, nboot = 20)
    
    # Filter interactions supported by fewer than 3 cells in source or target
    cc <- filterCommunication(cc, min.cells = 3)
    
    # Aggregate from LR-level to pathway-level
    cc <- computeCommunProbPathway(cc)
    cc <- aggregateNet(cc)
    
    # Compute centrality scores per cell type
    cc <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cc, slot.name = "netP")
    
    # Save full CellChat object
    saveRDS(cc, rds_path)
    
    # Export ligand–receptor-level interaction table with sample/condition annotation
    df.net <- subsetCommunication(cc)
    df.net$sample <- samp
    df.net$condition <- unique(data_samp$condition)
    write.csv(df.net, csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
    
    message("Done: ", samp)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("ERROR on sample ", samp, ": ", e$message)
  })
  
}
```
